channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 DietrichGebert/ponytail (70783 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DietrichGebert

📝 Repository: DietrichGebert/ponytail

📄 Descrizione: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

⭐ Stelle: 70783

🍴 Forks: 3653

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents claude claude-code claude-code-plugin cursor-rules developer-tools llm prompt-engineering yagni

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T00:52:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-02T05:53:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 cobusgreyling/loop-engineering (4727 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cobusgreyling

📝 Repository: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering

📄 Descrizione: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

⭐ Stelle: 4727

🍴 Forks: 601

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agentic-ai ai-agents ai-coding anthropic automation claude claude-code codex coding-agents devops-automation devtools github-actions grok llm loop-engineering mcp prompt-engineering

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-09T06:28:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-02T05:52:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit (992 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: withkynam

📝 Repository: withkynam/vibecode-pro-max-kit

📄 Descrizione: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 15 agents, 33 skills working with /goal, agent-team, & workflow on autopilot loops with 0 need for human gate. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack

⭐ Stelle: 992

🍴 Forks: 208

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agentic ai-agents ai-coding-assistant ai-development ai-workflow anthropic claude claude-code cli-tools code-quality codex coding-agents cursor developer-tools llm openai prompt-engineering typescript vibe-coding vibecoding

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-27T05:46:25Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-25T03:58:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 tejaswigowda/ffmpeg-webCLI (893 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tejaswigowda

📝 Repository: tejaswigowda/ffmpeg-webCLI

📄 Descrizione: A browser-based video editor powered by ffmpeg.wasm. No uploads, no servers -- all processing happens locally in your browser using WebAssembly.

⭐ Stelle: 893

🍴 Forks: 74

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: audio-editor browser-based client-side ffmpeg-wasm javascript local-first media-processing offline-first open-source privacy-first progressive-web-app pwa video-editor video-processing wasm web-cli web-worker webassembly zero-upload

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-30T22:31:34Z

📝 Repository: kadevin/ilab-gpt-conjure

📄 Descrizione: 面向 GPT-image-2 的 AI 图片生成 WebUI 工作台，支持 Codex Responses 与 OpenAI 兼容 API 接入，内置公用图库、多类型 Chip 快捷引用、提示词模板、多任务并发和本地队列管理。An AI image generation WebUI workbench for GPT-image-2 with Codex Responses and OpenAI-compatible API support, shared gallery references, multi-type quick chips, prompt templates, concurrent tasks, and local queue management.

⭐ Stelle: 598

🍴 Forks: 83

item.title: 📜 techjarves/Local-AI-Image-Generator (222 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: techjarves

📝 Repository: techjarves/Local-AI-Image-Generator

📄 Descrizione: A fully self-contained, offline AI image generation studio for Windows. Runs Stable Diffusion (Safetensors/GGUF) locally with zero manual setup. Auto-configures CUDA for Nvidia GPUs and Vulkan for AMD/Intel Arc cards. Zero system-wide dependencies required.

⭐ Stelle: 222

🍴 Forks: 81

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: image-generation local-ai stable-diffusion
